CreateRateLimitRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateRateLimitRule.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
CreateRateLimitRule.ingressBandwidthInMbps: Inbound bandwidth limit of the rate limiting policy, in Mbps
CreateRateLimitRule.egressBandwidthInMbps: Outbound bandwidth limit of the rate limiting policy, in Mbps
